summary_html: Telomeres are the protective caps on your chromosomes, and they shorten with age and stress. Learn what accelerates shortening after 40 and which habits and nutrients actually protect them.
seo_title: Telomere Length After 40: How to Slow Shortening | Happy Aging
seo_description: What shortens telomeres after 40 and what protects them. Real research on stress, exercise, omega-3s, and NAD+ for women who want to slow biological aging.
